character.name:
Create one true raster-based female alchemist pixel sprite using the two reference images with strictly separated purposes.

Use the first reference image only for the compact character proportions, sprite scale, front-facing idle presentation, pixel density, and classic Korean MMORPG readability. Do not inherit its class identity, robe, floating spirits, magical effects, hairstyle, hair color, or clothing palette.

Use the second reference image only for the female alchemist’s pale curly hair, fitted leather outfit, pale blouse, potion equipment, confident expression, and dark-fantasy field-alchemist identity.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Create a real low-resolution raster pixel sprite on an exact 64×88 pixel canvas.
Transparent background only.
One character only.
Show the complete body from the top of the hair to the bottom of the boots.
The visible character should be approximately 80 to 84 pixels tall.
Center the character and leave a small transparent margin around the silhouette.
Do not include a floor, cast shadow, background, checkerboard pattern, text, UI, frame, pedestal, or additional character.

PIXEL CONSTRUCTION:
Render the character directly as handcrafted low-resolution pixel art.
Build the sprite from intentional square pixel clusters.
Use a clean one-pixel outer outline where needed.
Use hard pixel transitions and nearest-neighbor-style edges.
Every curve must be constructed as visible pixel steps rather than smooth lines.
Do not use vector paths, vector strokes, Bézier curves, smooth contour lines, subpixel positioning, anti-aliasing, feathered edges, opacity gradients, airbrush shading, digital painting, or high-resolution illustration rendering.
Do not create an image that merely imitates pixel art through a pixel filter.
The final asset must read as authentic manually constructed raster pixel art at its native 64×88 resolution.

SPRITE STYLE AND PROPORTIONS:
Use a classic Korean MMORPG sprite style with Ragnarok Online-inspired scale and readability.
Use approximately 3.5-head-tall proportions.
Give her a large but balanced head, a slim compact torso, narrow shoulders, slender limbs, small hands, and small practical boots.
Keep the silhouette narrow, feminine, and clearly readable.
Do not make the body bulky, wide, overly realistic, excessively chibi, or super-deformed.

POSE:
Use a front-facing idle pose with only a slight three-quarter nuance.
Place one leg subtly forward.
Keep the shoulders level and the body balanced.
Raise one hand slightly while holding one small round potion bottle.
Keep the other arm relaxed near the body.
This is a neutral idle sprite, not a throwing pose, combat pose, casting pose, or dramatic action pose.

HAIR:
Follow the concept art with voluminous pale platinum-blonde curly hair.
The hair should reach below the shoulders but remain contained inside the compact sprite silhouette.
Construct the hairstyle from approximately four to six large readable curl masses rather than many individual strands.
Use pale cream, light beige-blonde, muted platinum-blonde, and restrained ivory highlights.
The hair must remain visibly pale blonde at sprite scale.
Do not turn the hair into pure white, metallic silver, gray, purple, blue, pink, or glowing magical hair.
Do not draw thin high-resolution hair strands, smooth spiral vectors, transparent wisps, or anti-aliased curls.

FACE:
Give her a confident, intelligent, and slightly severe expression.
Keep the facial features minimal and readable with only a few deliberate pixels.
Do not render realistic facial detail, smooth skin gradients, eyelashes, individual hair strands, or portrait-level features.

OUTFIT:
Create a practical dark-fantasy field-alchemist outfit based on the concept art.
Use a fitted dark brown leather vest over a pale ivory blouse.
Add rolled or fitted sleeves, dark trousers, leather wrist guards, a utility belt, small belt pouches, thigh straps, and dark knee-high boots.
Use restrained brass buckles and fittings.
Keep the clothing practical and slightly refined, but not aristocratic, magical, steampunk-heavy, or modern.
Simplify seams, buttons, straps, and buckles into a few readable pixel clusters.
Do not expose excessive skin.
Do not use a robe, long cape, laboratory coat, oversized shoulder armor, large skirt, or flowing magical cloth.

ALCHEMIST EQUIPMENT:
The raised hand should hold one compact round glass potion bottle containing muted poisonous green liquid.
Attach no more than three small potion vials to the belt.
Use one muted red vial and one small teal or purple vial as secondary class markers.
The potion bottles must remain simple, opaque enough to read, and constructed from hard pixel clusters.
Do not use smooth transparent glass gradients, realistic refraction, vector glass outlines, curved highlight strokes, liquid splashes, floating bottles, oversized flasks, laboratory apparatus, bubbling smoke, large vapor trails, glowing particles, or magical aura.
The alchemist identity must be communicated through the handheld potion, belt vials, leather equipment, and practical outfit rather than visual effects.

COLOR PALETTE:
Use a restrained limited palette of approximately 20 to 28 total colors.
Use pale cream and muted platinum for the hair.
Use ivory for the blouse.
Use dark brown, charcoal, and black-brown for the leather clothing.
Use muted bronze for small fittings.
Use dark gray-brown for the trousers and boots.
Reserve saturated green, red, teal, or purple only for a few tiny potion-liquid accents.
Do not use full gradients, excessive highlight colors, neon colors, broad glowing areas, or multicolored reflections.

SHADING:
Use compact two-step or three-step pixel shading.
Place highlights and shadows as solid clustered shapes.
Keep the light source consistent from the upper front.
Do not use smooth gradients, transparency-based shading, soft blur, ambient glow, reflective vector highlights, or realistic material rendering.

FINAL RESULT:
Produce a clean game-ready 64×88 female alchemist raster pixel sprite with authentic handcrafted pixel construction.
She must be immediately recognizable as a pale curly-haired dark-fantasy alchemist through her leather vest, ivory blouse, utility belt, compact potion bottles, and confident idle stance.
The sprite must have a transparent background, a compact readable silhouette, hard square pixels, stepped pixel curves, simplified details, and no visible vector-style lines or smooth rendering.
